task.title: Add standalone local Control Room shell
task.summary: Introduce a local-first browser Control Room shell and launch path that is independent of Pi TUI rendering while reading current CodeWiki state through application/API semantics.

goal.outcome: Users can launch a local browser Control Room for the current repo without relying on Pi TUI rendering.
acceptance: A local HTTP server binds to 127.0.0.1 by default and serves a retro terminal-styled Control Room shell.
A Pi launch command or equivalent package entry path starts the server and prints or opens the local URL.
The shell loads repository health, roadmap summary, active claims, and generated graph metadata from CodeWiki sources through a typed read model or API endpoint.
No browser UI or local web-server code imports Pi SDK or Pi TUI packages.
Typecheck, architecture check, smoke tests, and feature tests pass.
non_goals: No Claude Code or Codex adapter implementation in this slice.
No write actions beyond launch/read endpoints.

summary: TASK-058 standalone local Control Room shell
checks_run: manual local server smoke via startControlRoomServer + fetch / and /api/state

evidence: Added control-room.test.mjs covering state model, system model, graph model, argument parsing, server host, HTML, and /api/state.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added adapters/web/control-room.ts with local server, read models, static retro terminal shell, System diagram view, and Graph visual view.
Added /wiki-ui command and registered it in Pi adapter.
Updated README, codewiki skill, extension spec, and smoke command expectations.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added control-room.test.mjs covering state model, system model, graph model, argument parsing, server host, HTML, and /api/state.
code_change_evidence: Added adapters/web/control-room.ts with local server, read models, static retro terminal shell, System diagram view, and Graph visual view.
Added /wiki-ui command and registered it in Pi adapter.
Updated README, codewiki skill, extension spec, and smoke command expectations.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: A local HTTP server binds to 127.0.0.1 by default and serves a retro terminal-styled Control Room shell.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: startControlRoomServer defaults host to 127.0.0.1, serves /, CSS, JS, and API routes; control-room.test.mjs asserts host and HTML title; manual smoke fetched http://127.0.0.1:<port>/.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: A Pi launch command or equivalent package entry path starts the server and prints or opens the local URL.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added /wiki-ui [repo-path] [port] command in adapters/pi/commands/ui.ts; smoke test updated expected public commands.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: The shell loads repository health, roadmap summary, active claims, and generated graph metadata from CodeWiki sources through a typed read model or API endpoint.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: buildControlRoomStateModel reads status/roadmap/claims/graph metadata; /api/state serves it; browser boot loads /api/state.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: No browser UI or local web-server code imports Pi SDK or Pi TUI packages.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: grep extensions/codewiki/src/adapters/web for @earendil/pi/pi-tui/adapters/pi returned no matches.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Typecheck, architecture check, smoke tests, and feature tests pass.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit, node scripts/check-architecture.mjs, and npm test all passed.

risks: MVP uses custom SVG rendering instead of full Mermaid library; enough for current architecture.mmd but may need stronger Mermaid compatibility later.

checks_recorded: manual local server smoke via startControlRoomServer + fetch / and /api/state

closure_brief.user_intent: Launch a standalone local CodeWiki Control Room shell independent of Pi TUI rendering.
implemented_changes: Added local HTTP server and browser shell in extensions/codewiki/src/adapters/web/control-room.ts.
Added /wiki-ui launch command and registered it in the Pi adapter.
Added read models and API endpoints for state, system architecture, graph, and health.
Updated README, skill surface, smoke tests, and extension spec.
acceptance_evidence: control-room.test.mjs covers server host, HTML, /api/state, read models, and argument parsing.
Manual local server smoke fetched / and /api/state successfully.
npx tsc --noEmit, node scripts/check-architecture.mjs, and npm test passed.
checks: manual local server smoke via startControlRoomServer + fetch / and /api/state
non_goals_preserved: No Claude Code or Codex adapter implementation in this slice.
No write actions beyond launch/read endpoints.
remaining_risks: MVP uses a custom architecture renderer for the current Mermaid subset; richer Mermaid syntax may need parser expansion.
